Wait, I think I see the issue. The image shows the current state, and the small green square and red cross at the top might be at rows that I haven't checked. Let me scan more carefully.

Let me re-examine. The image shows:
- Top: small green square (gray-bordered) and a red cross
- Middle: green box with gray bar, two green U-shapes in gray container
- Bottom: yellow bar with red dot, two yellow U-shapes in gray container, red cross
Wait, maybe the "small green square" is actually the green box that I shrunk! The green box was at rows 9-11, and after shrinking it's still at rows 9-11 but smaller. The image might be showing it at a different position due to scaling.
Actually, I think the image is just a scaled-down version of the 64x64 grid. The "small green square" at the top is the shrunk green box at rows 9-11, cols 28-29. The red cross to its right is the red cross at rows 9-11, cols 51-53.
OK so I've been looking at the right things. The issue is that I don't understand the game mechanic.
Let me think about this differently. I have 19 actions used, and the target is about 20. I'm basically out of actions. Let me try one more thing: clicking on the center of one of the U-shapes.
The left green U-shape is at rows 20-22, cols 38-40. The center of the U-shape (the empty space) is at [21, 39]. Let me try clicking there.

Row 22: gcNNNcGcNNNcg
